author: m1--full-system-adversarial-review
content:
Result: Committed fix for 2 critical issues:
1. CRITICAL — Path traversal in knowledge page slug (knowledge.rs): Added safe_page_path() with character validation + canonicalization defense-in-depth. 6 new tests.
2. HIGH — Unicode panic in truncate (commands/knowledge.rs): Replaced byte-based slicing with crate::utils::truncate which uses .chars().take().

All 1055+ tests pass. Commit: 5be0eca
